⦗OSS CAD Suite⦘ (venv-church) sipantichijk@penguin:~/church-machine/hardware/soc_combined$ cd ~/church-machine/hardware/soc_combined

# 1. Has synthesis actually been re-run? (timestamp on map.v)
ls -lh outflow/church_soc_cm.map.v

# 2. What primitive holds those 2460 INIT_ lines?
grep "INIT_" outflow/church_soc_cm.map.v | head -3

# 3. What EFX_ primitives appear at all?
grep -oh "EFX_[A-Z0-9_]*" outflow/church_soc_cm.map.v | sort -u

# 4. Total line count of map.v (a full synthesis produces 100k+ lines)
wc -l outflow/church_soc_cm.map.v
-rw-r--r-- 1 sipantichijk sipantichijk 15M May 25 10:46 outflow/church_soc_cm.map.v

    defparam \u_cm/dmem__D$e12 .INIT_1 = 256'h00000000000000001F0141F0141F0141F0680006800068000680006800068000;
grep: write error: Broken pipe
